mapper.insert: INSERT INTO movies ( id, title, original_title, overview, poster_path, backdrop_path, release_date, vote_average, vote_count, popularity, original_language, runtime, is_now_playing, is_popular, is_top_rated ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{title}, #{originalTitle}, #{overview}, #{posterPath}, #{backdropPath}, #{releaseDate}, #{voteAverage}, #{voteCount}, #{popularity}, #{originalLanguage}, #{runtime}, #{isNowPlaying}, #{isPopular}, #{isTopRated} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE title = VALUES(title), original_title = VALUES(original_title), overview = VALUES(overview), poster_path = VALUES(poster_path), backdrop_path = VALUES(backdrop_path), release_date = VALUES(release_date), vote_average = VALUES(vote_average), vote_count = VALUES(vote_count), popularity = VALUES(popularity), original_language = VALUES(original_language), runtime = VALUES(runtime), is_now_playing = VALUES(is_now_playing), is_popular = VALUES(is_popular), is_top_rated = VALUES(is_top_rated);
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM movies WHERE is_now_playing = 1 ORDER BY release_date DESC
SELECT * FROM movies WHERE is_popular = 1 ORDER BY popularity DESC
SELECT * FROM movies WHERE is_top_rated = 1 ORDER BY vote_average DESC
